strategist_1.name: Need or Want
strategist_1.title: NEEDS VS WANTS
strategist_1.hint: ◀ NEED or WANT ▶ · sort each item
lesson: Needs are things you must have to live.
Wants are nice extras that can wait.
Skip a want and your savings grow.

strategist_2.name: Bill Catcher
strategist_2.title: BILL MANAGEMENT GRID
strategist_2.hint: MOVE to catch bills · pay them on time
lesson: Paying bills on time avoids extra fees.
A bill is money you owe by a due date.
Track due dates so none slip past.

strategist_3.name: Buffer Balance
strategist_3.title: EMERGENCY FUND VAULT
strategist_3.hint: TILT to keep the buffer steady in the zone
lesson: An emergency fund covers surprise costs.
Aim to save a few months of expenses.
A buffer keeps surprises from hurting you.

strategist_4.name: Value Quiz
strategist_4.title: SMART SPENDING PLAZA
lesson: Smart spending buys what is worth the most.
Ask if you truly need it first.

qs.q: Before a big buy you should…
A want you can skip helps you…

strategist_5.name: Goal Tower
strategist_5.title: GOAL TRACKER TOWER
strategist_5.hint: TAP to drop and stack toward your goal
lesson: A money goal gives your saving a target.
Save bit by bit to build toward it.

strategist_6.name: Save or Waste
strategist_6.title: EFFICIENCY LAB
strategist_6.hint: SWITCH lanes · grab savings, dodge waste
lesson: Cutting waste leaves more to save.
Small leaks of money add up fast.
Reuse and plan to spend less.
